# API design notes

<!-- PLANTED CLASSIFICATION: lives under docs/notes/, should classify
     as 'design-note' kind, not 'unknown'. Discovery test must pin this. -->

Random thoughts during early API design. Not authoritative. Most of
this got overridden by PRDv1 and PRDv2.

We considered:

- GraphQL (rejected, REST is fine)
- gRPC (out of scope for V1)
- Webhooks for downstream notification (TBD)
